commit_scope: Admit already-surveyed form-lower-cond and form-lower-map bands to the fourth-arm manifest.

commands: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh form-lower-cond form-lower-map
local_validation.notes: The post-PR #3010 fourth-arm survey classified form-lower-cond and form-lower-map as multi-pass at 31/31 before manifest admission. After adding the bands, the focused fourth-arm gate returns PASS-4WAY for both. Full Form validation returns 'fourth arm: 138 band(s) four-way' and '556 ok, 0 divergent'.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet. GitHub checks will be monitored after PR creation.

deploy_validation.summary: No deployment triggered by this commit. Public verification follows merge/deploy if deployment runs.

phase_gate.gate: Conditional and map lowering examples pass Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
phase_gate.next: Push PR, wait for checks, merge when checks allow, then continue to the next non-overlapping fourth-arm residual.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The fourth-arm manifest now carries form-lower-cond and form-lower-map alongside form-lower and form-lower-rec.
test_flows: form-lower-cond validates conditional lowering parity four-way at 31.
form-lower-map validates map lowering parity four-way at 31.
Full form validate.sh reports 138 fourth-arm bands and 556 ok / 0 divergent across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and covered fkwu bands.
e2e_validation.summary: This is a manifest floor ratchet for two already-passing lowering bands; no runtime code changes were needed.
